analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple directories (test-website, github-page, docs) containing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current event requests a theme related to black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The existing to-dos suggest incomplete CSS and JavaScript files, particularly in the test-website directory. The theme should focus on a dark, cosmic aesthetic with animations that evoke the mysterious and powerful nature of black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the theme is consistent across all sections and interactive elements.

Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Ensure the HTML structure supports the black hole theme with sections for interactive planets, animated slides, and other cosmic elements.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html, focusing on interactive elements related to black holes.
